creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Aldis,

#v+
===>  License accepted by the user
=> playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://aldis.git.bsdroot.lv/playd.sh/snapshot/.
fetch: http://aldis.git.bsdroot.lv/playd.sh/snapshot/playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz: size unknown
fetch: http://aldis.git.bsdroot.lv/playd.sh/snapshot/playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz: size of remote file is not known
playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz                                7799  B 5451  Bps
===>  Extracting for playd-1.7.12
=> MD5 Checksum mismatch for playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz.
===>  Refetch for 1 more times files: playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz 
===>  License accepted by the user
=> playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://aldis.git.bsdroot.lv/playd.sh/snapshot/.
fetch: http://aldis.git.bsdroot.lv/playd.sh/snapshot/playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz: size unknown
fetch: http://aldis.git.bsdroot.lv/playd.sh/snapshot/playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz: size of remote file is not known
fetch: playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz: local modification time does not match remote
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/playd.sh-1.7.12.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/home/abbe/tinderbox/ports/multimedia/playd.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/home/abbe/tinderbox/ports/multimedia/playd.
#v-

It seems you're trying to download a snapshot which is generated everytime at
the time of download. Could you host the tarball file somewhere instead of
dynamically generating it, hmm...?

Or simply, could you fix this issue ?

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA      | GPG: F682 CDCC 39DC 0FEA E116  20B6 C746 CFA9 E74F A4B0
